generated_oml:
instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized control parameters for system performance"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical operational metrics for analysis"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of crane movements and conditions"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation of model accuracy against physical data"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation applications for scenario testing"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven predictions for decision support"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes system performance through control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight, SimulationInsight, PredictionInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Records operational metrics for historical analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time monitoring of crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Ensures model accuracy by comparing with physical system data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series data storage and historical logging"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive data visualization and dashboarding"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Lightweight communication between physical and digital components via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment for environment consistency and reproducibility"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GitHub : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Version control for digital twin models and code"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swing dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleData
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors ambient wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedData
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of hoist swing dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedTimeSeries : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of ambient wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of the gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalControlService
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Motion dynamics model for crane movement"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo OptimalControlService
]

instance C4Model : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "C4 model for architecture visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Grafana
]

instance XAxisMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlling cart movement along X-axis"
]

instance ZAxisMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controlling hoisting along Z-axis"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Used for container handling at hoist end"
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical lab-scale gantry crane structure"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program collecting data from physical crane sensors"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Logs crane operational state to TimescaleDB"
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, XAxisMotor, ZAxisMotor, Electromagnet, PhysicalCraneInterface, LoggingApplication
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service creates movement trajectories using a kinematic model. The Control Application executes these commands via the Physical Crane Interface. The Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectories against simulations for discrepancies but does not explicitly confirm command execution. Specific command formats, validation mechanisms, and transmission protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization, utilizing context and container diagrams to define system boundaries, components, and their interactions within the gantry crane architecture."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A continuous validation service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulated trajectories, calculating distance metrics and comparing against an acceptable threshold to ensure model fidelity."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT Broker is used for inter-service signaling. TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL-based) stores data, and Grafana Dashboard visualizes database data. No details on network topology, bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols are provided."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "System runs on a personal computer. Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard containers are deployed using Docker. Other components are not specified as containerized. No details on scalability, reliability mechanisms, or backup procedures are mentioned."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Air Quality Management exemplar uses AutomationML as a standard for digital twin modeling, and the Lab Scale Gantry Crane uses the C4 Model for architecture visualization. However, most exemplars adopt an ad-hoc approach rather than commercial digital twin frameworks, indicating limited adherence to industry-wide standards beyond specific modeling tools."
]
